name: whatsapp-bookmark
title: WhatsApp Bookmark
description: Send clipboard links to yourself on WhatsApp as bookmarks
author: mihai

commands.name: send-link
commands.title: Send Link to WhatsApp
commands.description: Send the top clipboard link to yourself on WhatsApp

commands.name: pick-link
commands.title: Pick Link to Send
commands.description: Pick from recent clipboard links and send to WhatsApp

commands.name: auth
commands.title: WhatsApp Auth
commands.description: Authenticate with WhatsApp by scanning a QR code

commands.name: daemon-status
commands.title: WhatsApp Daemon Status
commands.description: Check if the WhatsApp daemon is running and connected

preferences.name: phoneNumber
preferences.title: Phone Number
preferences.description: Your WhatsApp phone number with country code (e.g. 40712345678)

preferences.name: daemonPort
preferences.title: Daemon Port
preferences.description: Port for the local WhatsApp daemon
